creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
What are the options settings you're using for rsyslog8 please?

Initial assesment: it looks like I need to add an openssl option in rsyslog8 to match the one in librelp, and that you will have to choose matching settings for openssl or gnutls in both rsyslog and librelp.  

It's annoying this doesn't trigger any errors until it fails at run-time.
